description: It's all about walking healthy with the skechers Shape-ups XT (Extended Training) shoe, which gives your feet the feeling of walking on sand, helping you centre your balance point. Packed with technologicaly features that are clearly explained in a CD that comes with this shoe, the Shape-Ups XT makes for a great buy for those who want to firm the calves and legs, strengthen the back, improve posture, tighten the abdominal muscles and reduce stress on the joints in ease. Upper Synthetic leather upper with overlays and eyelets on the medial midfoot for ventilation Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Cushioned tongue and collar with a fabric inner lining Brand tab on tongue and heel Midsole Two part firm-and-soft density midsole to create natural instability and deliver a rocking effect from the heel to the toe, activating muscles and reducing pressure on the joints and back Ultra-soft PU Kinetic Wedge extending from the heel to toe for gradual heel to toe transition, wherein the softer lower layer provides superior cushioning creating natural instability Outsole High density rubber outsole in a boat shape with leaf shaped lugs strategically placed Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
